critical.mandate: Report in percentiles (P50, P95, P99), not averages
Compare against baseline — never optimize blind

step.title: Scope
step.action: Define what to measure: specific endpoints, user flows, or full system
Identify performance-critical paths from user perspective
Determine frontend vs backend vs both scope

step.title: Baseline Capture
step.action: Document current performance metrics or establish baseline plan
Identify existing SLOs and performance budgets
Capture Core Web Vitals if frontend is in scope: LCP, FID, CLS

step.title: Load Test Design
step.action: Define test scenarios matching real user behavior
Design traffic patterns: steady state, ramp-up, spike, soak
Specify concurrent user targets and ramp-up strategy
Recommend tooling: k6, Locust, Artillery, or alternatives

step.title: Bottleneck Identification
step.action: Analyze for N+1 queries and inefficient database access
Check for blocking operations and synchronous bottlenecks
Identify memory leaks, large payloads, unoptimized loops
Review caching strategy: what's cached, what should be
Check frontend: bundle size, render blocking, image optimization

step.title: Optimization Recommendations
step.action: Provide specific, prioritized improvements with estimated impact
Categorize: quick wins, medium effort, architectural changes
Include implementation guidance for each recommendation

step.title: Generate Report
step.template-output: Generate performance review with: scope, baseline metrics, load test design, bottleneck analysis, prioritized recommendations with estimated impact.
